name: Parc Slip GWT Nature Reserve
terrain: Gravel paths, boardwalks, former colliery land
highlights: Former opencast colliery reclaimed to lapwing, skylark and cowslip-rich grassland.
points_of_interest: Gwent Wildlife Trust (Parc Slip); 1892 Parc Slip mine disaster memorial; bee orchid meadow
viewpoints: Wetland hide viewpoint; spoil-heap panorama to Bridgend
parking_start: Parc Slip visitor centre car park (free)
food_drink_nearby: GWT café (seasonal); The Masons Arms Aberkenfig
hazards_notes: Paths flood in winter; ground-nesters April–July
